objective: Implement the dependency-ordered WS-03 P0 database authority frontier only after the final WS-02 exact head is green, preserving applied migration immutability and Manager-owned assignment authority.
start_conditions: PR #31 final exact head passes Ratified Standard, Hermes review where applicable, Main Integration broad/source/build/archaeology/compiled-browser gates.
WS-02 database requirements are frozen and no unresolved source-level assignment or protocol bypass remains.
The branch is created from then-current main after PR #31 is merged or otherwise formally superseded.
success_criteria: A blank database applies the complete migration ledger through 0072 plus forward-only WS-03 migrations with deterministic hashes.
Effective-capability evidence has assignment/account uniqueness, current-report selection, freshness, and version-drift constraints.
RLS, grants, security-definer functions, and service-role boundaries deny cross-account, cross-employee, cross-assignment, and revoked access.
Concurrent authority-version changes invalidate stale credentials, projections, approvals, commands, and effects before commit.
Durable command and effect reservations remain idempotent under duplicate, lease-expiry, timeout, and accepted-response-loss races.
Existing-row backfills and rollback compatibility are tested without modifying any applied migration.
Triggered managed Supabase behavior is proven on a disposable project and is not inferred from local PostgreSQL.
forbidden_files: mvp-build/STANDARD.md without explicit ratification change control
Hermes image pin or upstream source
production database as a routine test target
known_blockers: PR #31 is not yet exact-head green or merged.
Disposable managed Supabase project and approved release-proof credentials must be available for triggered platform checks.
No WS-03 acceptance may inherit the green ancestor of a later documentation or source head.
mitigations: Agility is intentionally lower because database authority work must be dependency-ordered and concurrency-proven rather than parallelized across unstable schemas.
Use one forward migration per coherent invariant and keep source, tests, plan, and evidence synchronized in the same reviewed PR.
